archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) mixed with Neo-Brutalist contrast

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Neo-Brutalist Soft: Mixes approachable pastel backgrounds with sharp, crisp 1px borders and hard block shadows for hierarchy without muddiness.

component_instructions.buttons: Primary buttons use bg-[#FFB5A7] with a solid 1px dark border and hard shadow. Hover state must deepen the color and extend the shadow. Secondary buttons use bg-white or bg-[#F8EDEB].
component_instructions.cards: White background, rounded-xl, 1px solid border-[#1A1A1A], highly structured internal padding (p-6). No blurry box-shadows.
component_instructions.tables: Shadcn tables but override default borders to be solid black/10 or solid #1A1A1A depending on emphasis. Header rows should use bg-[#F8EDEB] for subtle distinction.
component_instructions.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Use glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/20) with a solid white content box with the hard shadow effect.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn input/select components customized with 1px solid border-[#1A1A1A], rounded-lg, focus states using peach rings.
component_instructions.navigation: Hamburger menu for mobile navigation. Desktop should feature a clean top navbar or side navigation (sticky). Active links highlighted with a peach background (#FFB5A7) and bold text.

page_specifics.login: Split screen layout. Left side: soft peach pastel background with the 'login_illustration' vertically and horizontally centered. Right side: Clean white login form with 'Pre-loaded Credentials' info banner.
page_specifics.student_dashboard: Bento grid layout. Top row: Welcome Banner (Hero bento spanning full width) + Selected Entities list (3 slots). Middle: Weekly Schedule Grid (detailed time table). Bottom: Quick access to the Questionnaire.
page_specifics.school_dashboard: High-level overview. Top: KPI bento boxes (Total students, assigned, questionnaires completed). Middle: Satisfaction Charts (Recharts). Bottom: Student-Entity Assignment Grid.
page_specifics.admin_dashboard: Data-heavy layout. Tabs at top for 'Manage Entities', 'Questionnaires', 'Students'. Includes a prominent 'Upload CSV' dropzone in the Students/Entities tabs.
page_specifics.entity_selection_modal: Grid of available entities. Each card shows name, sector, capacity, and an 'Add' button. Must not allow more than 3 selections.
page_specifics.questionnaire: Integrated multi-step or clean single-page form using Shadcn Forms. Success screen displays the pastel success colors and redirects to dashboard.

images.description: Abstract pastel geometric background, perfect for banners, headers, or login split screen.
Student organizing tasks illustration for the login page.
Empty state clipboard illustration. Use when no entities are selected or no data exists in tables.
Modern concrete building. Use as a default cover image for Entity Details if specific ones aren't available.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='entity-select-btn', data-testid='upload-csv-input'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure dark text (#1A1A1A or #2C2C2C) is always used over pastel backgrounds to pass APCA/WCAG contrast ratios.
accessibility_and_testing.hover_states: Hover states must always change background hue AND deepen shadows to provide clear interactive feedback.
